to: ask an officer of the Service or a Welsh family proceedings officer to monitor compliance with a child arrangements order

conditions.text: the court makes a child arrangements order containing provision of a kind mentioned in section 11C(1)(a)(i), (ii) or (iii), or an order varying a child arrangements order

for: the officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer
to: comply with any request under subsection (2)
make a request under subsection (2) at any time during the subsequent course of the proceedings

conditions.text: the proceedings relate to contact with the child concerned or to the child's living arrangements

to: specify the period for monitoring compliance with the order
make an order under subsection (8) with respect to an individual who is a child

conditions.text: the individual is a parent of the child with respect to whom the order was made

to: make a request under subsection (2) in relation to a child arrangements order that is an excepted order

conditions.text: the order is an excepted order (within the meaning given by section 11B(4))
